title: turnera hassleriana
intro: Turnera hassleriana, also known as Yellow Passionflower, is a flowering plant native to Paraguay. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, and its health benefits may include reducing stress and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of Turnera hassleriana can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
